name: Turkey or Chicken Tenders
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the turkey tenderloins or chicken breasts into 6 slices by cutting across the turkey carefully with a sharp knife.
2. Pound the tenders to 1/4 inch thickness.
3. Make slits around the edges of the tenders to prevent them from curling.
4. Coat the tenders by blending half cup of oat bran cereal with salt and pepper.
5. Whip the egg whites lightly with milk.
6. Blend the remaining three quarters of oat bran with paprika.
7. Dip the meat into the egg whites, then into the oat bran paprika mixture.
8. Place the tenders on a baking rack and allow 5 minutes to dry.
9. Heat peanut oil in a large frying pan until hot.
10. Brown the tenders 2-3 pieces at a time for 3 minutes per side, or until crusty and brown.
11. Drain well and serve with a low-fat dip.
